Reddie - Domain Crawler

spark

Code assistant

Create a domain crawler app for Red Points, called Reddie, that scans URLs and finds fake websites for your domain. Once you hit scan, it starts scanning and gives you a visual perception that is scanning, and then you see the fake domains blurred in the background. In order to get the full report of fake links, you have to leave your first name, last name, and email. And we will send you the full report.

it's perfect, but I want the look & feel to look exactly as the image attached

Captura de pantalla 2025-12-17 a las 11.21.26.png
Gemini 3 Flash Preview Ran for s
spark Integrating "Reddie" Logo
chevron_right

To make the app look exactly like the Red Points screenshot provided (Dark theme, specific typography, purple accents, and gradients), I will transform the application into a "Dark Mode" interface.

Here are the specific changes:

  1. Global Theme: Switch from slate/white to a deep dark navy/black background (#0F111A) consistent with the image.

  2. Typography: Update headings to match the "Eliminate fakes..." style, including the text gradient on "fakes".

  3. Components:

    • Header: Dark background, white text, updated buttons ("Talk to sales" outline, "Request demo" style purple button).

    • Scanner (Hero): Replicate the hero text ("Eliminate fakes..."), add the "Trusted by" section, and style the input field to fit the dark theme.

    • Scanning Overlay: Update animations to glow against the dark background.

    • Results: Update the locked results table and form to use dark cards (#1C1F2E) with light text.

spark Assessing Readability Refinements

To update the H1 copy as requested, I'll modify components/Scanner.tsx. I have corrected the likely typo "Scan" to "Scam" to match the context of "Phishing" and the application's purpose, while maintaining the gradient styling for the key phrase.
